title: 函館スプリントSの後に・1200！

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, no, this is nothing! Though I won't deny that
my dash out of the gate was textbook perfection!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The CBC Sho is up next. That makes 2,400
meters if you add them up...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's getting a little tight, but I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Where else would we go! Do you have another
place in mind?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: We're in Hakodate and Hakodate means...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin-ing over to a tasty seafood bowl
restaurant!
